revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
revision.text:
{{Portal|Japan|Asia|History}} {{Commons category}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{draft categories|

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1680s_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
